description_long: This stereo sound system features a robust, rectangular wooden enclosure with a rich, dark wood grain finish. The front section is recessed, housing a control panel with a series of blue-lit buttons and a central display screen set into a raised back panel. The top surface is flat and wide, with the display screen slightly elevated for easy visibility. The sides and rear are solid wood, with no visible openings or ports, giving the unit a monolithic appearance. The control panel is integrated into the front-facing recess, making it easily accessible for users. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in urban interiors such as offices, studios, or public spaces.
description: A modern stereo sound system with a dark wood finish, blue-lit control panel, and a central display screen set into a recessed front section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed control panel with blue-lit buttons and a central display screen, all set within a dark wood enclosure.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid wood panel and a partial glimpse of the control panel and display screen set back from the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous, unbroken wood surface with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a solid wood panel and partial visibility of the control panel and display screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A horizontal row of blue-lit buttons embedded in a recessed control panel on the front, with a central display screen above the buttons. No visible knobs or sliders.
